name: libimage-magick-perl
title: libimage-magick-perl
summary: Perl interface to the ImageMagick graphics routines
description:
Perl interface to the ImageMagick graphics routines
PerlMagick is an objected-oriented Perl interface to ImageMagick.
Use the module to read, manipulate, or write an image or image sequence from
within a Perl script. This makes it very suitable for Web CGI scripts.
.
This is the compatibility (wrapper) perlmagick package that
use the default channel depth.
.
This package provides the perl Image::Magick class.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libimage-magick-perl because Perl interface to the ImageMagick graphics routines.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libimage-magick-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libimage-magick-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libimage-magick-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
